doc_title: Understanding the Difficulty of Training Transformers

items.evidence_span: Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017) have led to a series of breakthroughs

items.fact: The anchor cites Vaswani et al. (2017)
items.evidence_span: The Transformer architecture contains two types of sublayers, i.e., Attention sub-layers and Feedforward (FFN) sub-layers. They are composed of mainly three basic modules (Vaswani et al., 2017),

items.fact: The anchor cites Ba et al. (2016)
items.evidence_span: Layer norm (Ba et al., 2016) plays a vital role in Transformer architecture.
Dong et al. (2020) find that the network depth plays a similar role with the sample number in numerical ODE solvers
